changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "Fate of an Outlaw"

TextENGNew: Haah, haah, haah, haah, haah, haah......!
I finally stopped when I could no longer hear the footsteps and angry shouts of the police.

My whole body was already drenched in sweat, and not just my feet, but all the muscles in my entire body were trembling. Not only that, but my lungs were as hot as a raging fire. They felt like they were about to burst.
Shit......! I felt dizzy. I'd already thrown up while on the run earlier, but a lump of air welled up in my throat like I still had more to vomit. I felt like total crap.
My pants and other clothes looked absolutely miserable, caked with mud, sweat, and vomit.
``Ugh... Shit...! Damn it...!!``
Things ended up like this because of that pest. She can't do anything worth a damn, yet she called up some annoying punks, defied me, and even got the police involved...!
I'm sure they already told the police about the drugs. I had even kept it hidden from Ritsuko until now, but it all fell apart thanks to that bitch.
I was able to get by before with no evidence of violence or extortion, but this drug is different. I'll definitely get thrown in jail for two to three years.
``Fuck you... I'll kill you...! I swear I'll kill you when I come baaaack!!``
``...So sorry, but that's impossible.``
I heard a cold voice coming from behind and quickly turned around. There, stood a woman with a dry smile on her face.
This chick... yes, that's right. She's that nurse from the Irie clinic...
``Heh, heheh......! Perfect timing. You'll get your reward for coming here. Be quiet now...!``
``...Oh? What do you intend to do with me?``
``A-ain't it obvious...?! Gonna use you as a hostage 'til I can ditch the cops...!``
``......Hee hee hee. This lowborn man is too shallow to even think it through... Hee hee hee!``
...Wh-what's with this woman...?!
Even though I was standing right in front of her holding a huge knife, she didn't budge.
In fact, her icy smile seemed to get even colder, as she carefully stared at me with her eyes open wide... walking up to me in slow motion like she was just taking a barefoot stroll.
Yes... like a carnivore peeling back its fangs and stretching out its nails... A cruel, menacing atmosphere seemed to leak from her entire body... Am I being threatened?
``S... stop!! I-I'll stab this into your eye...?!``
``It's too big to fit in there. Although...``
``Gyaah?! Gwaaaaahh...!!``
``This lead bullet might fit in your eye, though. ...Shall we give it a try?``
``...Oh my, it's over already? You fainted from just a few warning shots...? Hee hee hee...!``
``...I won't let you die that easily. You bring back unpleasant memories...!!``
